option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Docker configuration for BookLog API FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY build/libs/api-movil-gestor-libros-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Docker configuration for BookLog API FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-jammy
WORKDIR /app
COPY build/libs/api-movil-gestor-libros-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]
